license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.udwes7e
title: Predictors of Energy and Fatigue in graduate health sciences students
author: Ali Boolani

steps_raw.instruction: Complete the following surveys Pittsburgh Sleep Quality Inventory O'Connor Trait and State Mental and Physical Fatigue and Energy Survey Rapid Eating Assessment for Participants-Short Form Caffeine consumption survey International Physical Activity Questionnaire-Short Form Profile of Mood Survey- Short Form

Fit participants with the mask to measure RMR using the Cosmed Fitmate Pro Put the sleeve of the BSX Insight NIRS on the right lateral gastrocnemius Seat participants for 5 minutes Collect data for the next 10 minutes
